'''''Fastblast''''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] affiliated with the [[Invids]] ran by the renegade [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Leonia Tavira]]. The ship's crew referred to themselves as the [[Fastblasters]].

The Fastblasters were the first pirate gang that [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], in his guise as the "Ghost [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]", targeted for harassment in his attempt at convincing the many pirates of [[Courkrus]] to abandon Tavira's Invids during his quest to find his [[Mirax Terrik Horn|wife]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. After badly beating up a trio of pirates from the crew, which consisted of a male and female [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]], Horn declared that he would kill the next Fastblasters he saw on the streets from then onward. ''Fastblast'' fled the [[Star system/Legends|system]] three days later.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
